$comment: Single source of truth (SoT) for RemotePair branding/identifiers. Consumers (Casks, client/ide/product.json, host/app Swift, host/rd Cargo) must match these values and are validated by shared/identity/check-identity.sh. May be generated and injected via build-time codegen (docs/ide-merge-architecture.md) in the future.

host.desc: Menu-bar host for remote pairing with Claude (tmux + approve + sessions)
